description_long: This is a rectangular ceramic plate with a slightly wavy, glossy white surface, supported by four small feet at the corners. On the plate sits a large, rolled omelette covered in a rich layer of brown sauce, white mayonnaise, and finely chopped green herbs, resembling a Japanese-style omurice or okonomiyaki. The plate itself has a handcrafted appearance, with uneven edges and a subtle texture that gives it a rustic, artisanal feel. The food item is visually prominent, with the sauces drizzled in parallel lines and the herbs adding a pop of color. The plate rests on a wooden board, which serves as a base and adds to the presentation. No visible handles or additional features are present on the plate, and the overall condition appears clean and pristine.
description: A glossy, handcrafted white ceramic plate with a rolled omelette topped with sauces and herbs, presented on a wooden board. The plate has a rustic, artisanal look with uneven edges and a clean, pristine appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the plate's wavy edges, the omelette's toppings, and the wooden board beneath, with the food's end facing forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the length of the omelette and the plate's thickness, with the sauces and herbs visible along the top.
description_view_2: Rear angled view reveals the opposite end of the omelette and the plate's four small feet, with the wooden board partially visible.
description_view_3: Direct top-down view emphasizes the full length of the plate and omelette, showing the even distribution of toppings and the plate's rectangular shape.
attribute_surrounding_context: The plate is placed on a wooden board, which serves as a base.
